subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in truth unto a people who understand. Verily, there is no God but Him; His is all creation and command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یفقهون انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر
subcodes.subjects: @idolatry, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
